source: Curmudgeon digest: part6-sha256-recycling.c2.json and predictions-catalog.c2.json patchable fixes

patches.find: the catalog lists {{PRED_TOTAL}} entries spanning 10 domains
patches.replace: the catalog lists {{PRED_TOTAL}} entries spanning 12 categories
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon part6-sha256-recycling.c2: predictions.json has 12 unique category values (eclipse, geomagnetic, schumann, geodetic, coordinate, optical, aetheric_current, seismic, tidal, thermal, cosmological, toroidal), not 10 domains.
